# MoneyLine API â€” LLM Reference

> Base URL: `https://mlapi.bet/v1`
> Docs: https://www.moneylineapp.com/docs
> Dashboard: https://www.moneylineapp.com/dashboard

---

## Authentication

All API requests require an API key passed via the `x-api-key` header.

```
x-api-key: ml_live_<your_key>
```

Keys are created in the dashboard at https://www.moneylineapp.com/dashboard/keys (max 5 active keys per account).

---

## Tiers & Credits

| Tier | Price | Credits/mo | Req/min | Odds | Edge | Injuries | Play-by-Play |
|------|-------|-----------|---------|------|------|----------|-------------|
| Free | $0 | 1,000 | 10 | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| Starter | $29 | 150,000 | 60 | 1 bookmaker or exchange | â€” | Yes | â€” |
| Pro | $149 | 1,500,000 | 200 | All bookmakers + exchanges | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Business | $299 | 5,000,000 | 500 | All bookmakers + exchanges | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Enterprise | Custom | Unlimited | Unlimited | All bookmakers + exchanges | Yes | Yes | Yes |

Odds coverage includes sportsbooks from the `us` and `us2` regions plus exchanges and prediction markets from the `us_ex` region (e.g. Sporttrade, Kalshi, Betfair Exchange US). The default `sourceType=all` on odds endpoints returns all venue types. Edge endpoints default to `sourceType=sportsbook` to keep signals clean; exchanges are opt-in via `?sourceType=exchange` or `?sourceType=all`.

- **1 credit = 1 API request** (account-level, shared across all keys)
- **Business tier** supports overage billing at $0.00015/credit beyond the limit
- **Free tier** is restricted to NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL

---

## Response Format

### Success

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": { "count": 10, "page": 1, "pages": 5, "total": 50 }
}
```

### Error

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": { "code": 401, "message": "Invalid or missing API key." }
}
```

### Error Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 400 | Bad request / invalid parameters |
| 401 | Missing or invalid API key |
| 403 | Tier too low for this endpoint |
| 404 | Resource not found |
| 429 | Rate limit or credit limit exceeded |
| 500 | Server error |

---

## Rate Limit Headers

Every response includes:

```
X-RateLimit-Limit: 60
X-RateLimit-Remaining: 42
X-RateLimit-Reset: 38
```

When exceeded, you receive a 429 with `Retry-After: 60`.

---

## Endpoints

### Sports & Leagues

#### GET /v1/sports
List all sports and their leagues.

**Tier:** Free

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "sport": "basketball",
      "leagues": [{ "leagueId": "nba", "name": "NBA" }]
    }
  ]
}
```

---

#### GET /v1/leagues
List all leagues, optionally filtered by sport.

**Tier:** Free
**Params:** `?sport=basketball`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "meta": { "count": 4 },
  "data": [
    { "leagueId": "nba", "name": "NBA", "sport": "basketball" }
  ]
}
```

---

#### GET /v1/leagues/:leagueId
Get a single league by ID.

**Tier:** Free
**League IDs:** `nba`, `nfl`, `mlb`, `nhl`

---

### Events & Scores

#### GET /v1/events
List events with filtering and pagination.

**Tier:** Free
**Params:**
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| league | string | â€” | Filter by league ID |
| sport | string | â€” | Filter by sport |
| date | string | â€” | Exact date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| from | string | â€” | Range start (ISO 8601) |
| to | string | â€” | Range end (ISO 8601) |
| status | string | â€” | `scheduled`, `in_progress`, or `final` |
| limit | number | 25 | Max 100 |
| page | number | 1 | Page number |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "meta": { "count": 14, "total": 142, "page": 1, "pages": 6 },
  "data": [
    {
      "eventId": "nba-ev-311286",
      "leagueId": "nba",
      "sport": "basketball",
      "homeTeamName": "Boston Celtics",
      "awayTeamName": "Los Angeles Lakers",
      "startTime": "2026-03-09T23:30:00.000Z",
      "status": "final",
      "scores": { "home": 112, "away": 105 }
    }
  ]
}
```

---

#### GET /v1/events/live
Get all in-progress events with live scores.

**Tier:** Free
**Params:** `?league=nba`

In-progress events include `period` and `clock` fields.

---

#### GET /v1/events/today
Get today's scheduled events.

**Tier:** Free
**Params:** `?league=nba`

---

#### GET /v1/events/:eventId
Get full details for a single event.

**Tier:** Free

---

#### GET /v1/events/:eventId/play-by-play
Get play-by-play data for a specific event.

**Tier:** Pro+

---

#### GET /v1/leagues/:leagueId/scores
Get game scores for a league on a specific date.

**Tier:** Free
**Params:** `?date=2026-03-20` (defaults to today)

---

#### GET /v1/leagues/:leagueId/standings
Get current standings for a league.

**Tier:** Free
**Params:** `?conference=Eastern&division=Atlantic`

---

### Teams & Players

#### GET /v1/leagues/:leagueId/teams
List all teams in a league.

**Tier:** Free

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "meta": { "count": 30, "league": "nba" },
  "data": [
    { "teamId": "nba-bos", "name": "Boston Celtics", "abbreviation": "BOS", "leagueId": "nba" }
  ]
}
```

---

#### GET /v1/teams/:teamId
Get detailed info for a team.

**Tier:** Free

---

#### GET /v1/teams/:teamId/roster
Get the current roster for a team.

**Tier:** Free

**Response includes:** Array of `{ playerId, name, position, number }`

---

#### GET /v1/teams/:teamId/injuries
Get the injury report for a team.

**Tier:** Starter+

**Response includes:** Array of `{ name, status, injury }`

---

#### GET /v1/teams/:teamId/stats
Get aggregated stats for a team.

**Tier:** Free
**Params:** `?season=2025`

---

#### GET /v1/teams/:teamId/schedule
Get the schedule (past and upcoming) for a team.

**Tier:** Free

---

#### GET /v1/players/:playerId
Get detailed info for a player.

**Tier:** Free

---

#### GET /v1/players/:playerId/stats
Get stats for a player.

**Tier:** Free
**Params:**
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| type | string | season | `season` or `game` |
| season | string | current | Season year (e.g. "2025" or "2025-26") |
| eventId | string | â€” | For `type=game` only. Filter to one exact event ID |
| date | string | â€” | For `type=game` only. Exact date (`YYYY-MM-DD`) |
| from | string | â€” | For `type=game` only. Range start (`YYYY-MM-DD` or ISO 8601) |
| to | string | â€” | For `type=game` only. Range end (`YYYY-MM-DD` or ISO 8601) |

**Notes:**
- If `type` is omitted, the API returns season summaries.
- `type=season` rejects `date`, `from`, and `to`.
- `type=season` rejects `eventId`.
- `date` cannot be combined with `from` or `to`.
- `type=career` is not currently supported.
- Player stats are refreshed daily.

---

### Odds & Bookmakers

#### GET /v1/odds
Browse odds with filtering. Returns odds from sportsbooks and exchanges by default.

**Tier:** Starter+
**Params:**
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| league | string | â€” | Filter by league ID |
| market | string | â€” | `moneyline`, `spreads`, or `totals` |
| bookmaker | string | â€” | Filter by bookmaker key or name |
| sourceType | string | `all` | `sportsbook`, `exchange`, or `all` |
| limit | number | 25 | Max 50 |
| page | number | 1 | Page number |

**Notes:**
- Starter tier sees 1 bookmaker per event (sportsbooks are prioritized â€” exchanges appear only when no sportsbook is present).
- Pro+ sees all bookmakers and exchanges.
- `sourceType`, `bookmaker`, and `market` filters are applied before tier slicing, so requesting a specific exchange on a Starter key returns that exchange if it is the only match.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "meta": { "count": 25, "page": 1 },
  "data": [
    {
      "eventId": "nba-ev-311310",
      "leagueId": "nba",
      "bookmakers": [
        {
          "bookmakerId": "draftkings",
          "bookmakerName": "DraftKings",
          "sourceRegion": "us",
          "sourceType": "sportsbook",
          "markets": [...]
        },
        {
          "bookmakerId": "sporttrade",
          "bookmakerName": "Sporttrade",
          "sourceRegion": "us_ex",
          "sourceType": "exchange",
          "markets": [...]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

---

#### GET /v1/events/:eventId/odds
Get odds for a specific event.

**Tier:** Starter+
**Params:**
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| sourceType | string | `all` | `sportsbook`, `exchange`, or `all` |

---

#### GET /v1/odds/bookmakers
List all tracked bookmakers and exchanges.

**Tier:** Starter+
**Params:**
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| sourceType | string | `all` | `sportsbook`, `exchange`, or `all` |

**Response:** Array of `{ bookmakerId, name, sourceType, sourceRegion }`

```json
[
  { "bookmakerId": "draftkings",  "name": "DraftKings",  "sourceType": "sportsbook", "sourceRegion": "us" },
  { "bookmakerId": "espnbet",     "name": "ESPN BET",    "sourceType": "sportsbook", "sourceRegion": "us2" },
  { "bookmakerId": "sporttrade",  "name": "Sporttrade",  "sourceType": "exchange",   "sourceRegion": "us_ex" }
]
```

---

### Edge Data & Analysis

#### GET /v1/edge
Browse edge opportunities (arbitrage, value bets, positive EV).

**Tier:** Pro+
**Params:**
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| type | string | â€” | `arbitrage`, `value`, or `ev` |
| league | string | â€” | Filter by league ID |
| sourceType | string | `sportsbook` | `sportsbook`, `exchange`, or `all` |
| minProfit | number | â€” | Min profit % (arbitrage only) |
| minEdge | number | â€” | Min edge % (value bets only) |
| limit | number | 25 | Max 50 |
| page | number | 1 | Page number |

**sourceType behavior for edge endpoints:**
- `sportsbook` (default) â€” sportsbook-only arbs + sportsbook value/EV bets. Exchange venues are excluded.
- `exchange` â€” exchange-only arbs + exchange value/EV bets.
- `all` â€” all edges including mixed sportsbook/exchange arbitrage.

**Arbitrage edge payload:**
```json
{
  "type": "arbitrage",
  "venueType": "sportsbook",
  "market": "moneyline",
  "arbitrage": {
    "books": [
      { "bookmaker": "DraftKings", "bookmakerId": "draftkings", "sourceType": "sportsbook", "sourceRegion": "us", "outcome": "Team A", "odds": -110, "stake": 523.81 }
    ],
    "profitPct": 2.5,
    "guaranteedProfit": 25.0,
    "totalStake": 1000
  }
}
```

**Value edge payload:**
```json
{
  "type": "value",
  "sourceType": "sportsbook",
  "sourceRegion": "us",
  "market": "moneyline",
  "outcome": "Team A",
  "valueBet": {
    "bookmaker": "FanDuel", "bookmakerId": "fanduel",
    "odds": +145, "impliedProb": 0.408, "modelProb": 0.472,
    "edgePct": 6.4, "kellyCriterion": 0.108
  }
}
```

---

#### GET /v1/edge/arbitrage
Get arbitrage opportunities.

**Tier:** Pro+
**Params:** `?league=nba&minProfit=2&sourceType=sportsbook`

Default `sourceType=sportsbook`. Use `sourceType=all` to include mixed sportsbook/exchange arbs.

---

#### GET /v1/edge/value
Get value bets where odds exceed fair probability.

**Tier:** Pro+
**Params:** `?league=nba&minEdge=5&sourceType=sportsbook`

Default `sourceType=sportsbook`. Edges are emitted as `type: 'value'` with a `valueBet` field.

---

#### GET /v1/edge/ev
Get positive expected value bets (below the value-bet edge threshold).

**Tier:** Pro+
**Params:** `?league=nba&sourceType=sportsbook`

---

#### GET /v1/events/:eventId/edge
Get edge data for a specific event.

**Tier:** Pro+
**Params:**
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| sourceType | string | `sportsbook` | `sportsbook`, `exchange`, or `all` |

---

## Quick-Start Examples

### Fetch today's NBA games

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/events/today?league=nba"
```

### Get live scores

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/events/live"
```

### Get odds for a game (Starter+)

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/events/nba-ev-311310/odds"
```

### Get arbitrage opportunities (Pro+)

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/edge/arbitrage?league=nba&minProfit=1"
```

### Get exchange-inclusive arbitrage (Pro+)

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/edge/arbitrage?league=nba&sourceType=all"
```

### List exchanges only (Starter+)

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/odds/bookmakers?sourceType=exchange"
```

### Get exchange odds for a game (Starter+)

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/events/nba-ev-311310/odds?sourceType=exchange"
```

### Get team roster

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/teams/nba-bos/roster"
```

### Get player season stats

```bash
curl -H "x-api-key: ml_live_YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://mlapi.bet/v1/players/nba-p-12345/stats?type=season"
```

---

## Endpoint Summary

| Method | Path | Tier | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | /v1/sports | Free | List sports and leagues |
| GET | /v1/leagues | Free | List leagues |
| GET | /v1/leagues/:leagueId | Free | Get single league |
| GET | /v1/events | Free | List events (paginated) |
| GET | /v1/events/live | Free | In-progress events |
| GET | /v1/events/today | Free | Today's events |
| GET | /v1/events/:eventId | Free | Single event |
| GET | /v1/events/:eventId/play-by-play | Pro | Play-by-play data |
| GET | /v1/leagues/:leagueId/scores | Free | Scores by date |
| GET | /v1/leagues/:leagueId/standings | Free | League standings |
| GET | /v1/leagues/:leagueId/teams | Free | Teams in league |
| GET | /v1/teams/:teamId | Free | Team details |
| GET | /v1/teams/:teamId/roster | Free | Team roster |
| GET | /v1/teams/:teamId/injuries | Starter | Injury report |
| GET | /v1/teams/:teamId/stats | Free | Team stats |
| GET | /v1/teams/:teamId/schedule | Free | Team schedule |
| GET | /v1/players/:playerId | Free | Player details |
| GET | /v1/players/:playerId/stats | Free | Player stats by season, exact event, or game/date range |
| GET | /v1/odds | Starter | Browse odds |
| GET | /v1/events/:eventId/odds | Starter | Event odds |
| GET | /v1/odds/bookmakers | Starter | List bookmakers |
| GET | /v1/edge | Pro | Browse edge data |
| GET | /v1/edge/arbitrage | Pro | Arbitrage opportunities |
| GET | /v1/edge/value | Pro | Value bets |
| GET | /v1/edge/ev | Pro | Positive EV bets |
| GET | /v1/events/:eventId/edge | Pro | Event edge data |
